synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-2706 Important: Oracle Linux 10 golang security update
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-2706

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-2706.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
go-toolset-1.25.7-1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
golang-1.25.7-1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
golang-bin-1.25.7-1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
golang-docs-1.25.7-1.el10_1.noarch.rpm
golang-misc-1.25.7-1.el10_1.noarch.rpm
golang-race-1.25.7-1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
golang-src-1.25.7-1.el10_1.noarch.rpm
golang-tests-1.25.7-1.el10_1.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
go-toolset-1.25.7-1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
golang-1.25.7-1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
golang-bin-1.25.7-1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
golang-docs-1.25.7-1.el10_1.noarch.rpm
golang-misc-1.25.7-1.el10_1.noarch.rpm
golang-race-1.25.7-1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
golang-src-1.25.7-1.el10_1.noarch.rpm
golang-tests-1.25.7-1.el10_1.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol10/SRPMS-updates/golang-1.25.7-1.el10_1.src.rpm
